Uses of Interface
com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx.DataSerializer

  • Packages that use DataSerializer 
    Package Description
    com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx
    Conduct X-API Data Communication.
    com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx.impl  

    • Uses of DataSerializer in com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx

      Methods in com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx that return DataSerializer 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static DataSerializer DataSerializerFactory.getSerializer(java.lang.String type)
      Return DataSerializer according to type.

    • Uses of DataSerializer in com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx.impl

      Classes in com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx.impl that implement DataSerializer 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  MiBinaryDataSerializer
      transform PlatformData to defined Binary type from MiPlatform and output withOutputStream.
      class  MiXmlDataSerializer
      transform PlatformData to XML type defined in MiPlatform and output with OutputStream or Writer.
      class  PlatformBinaryDataSerializer
      transform PlatformData to Binary type defined in nexacro platform and output with OutputStream.
      class  PlatformHtmlDataSerializer
      transform PlatformData to HTML type defined in nexacro platform and output withOutputStream or Writer.
      class  PlatformJsonDataSerializer
      transform PlatformData to JSON type defined in nexacro platform and output with OutputStream.
      class  PlatformSsvDataSerializer
      transform PlatformData to SSV type defined in nexacro platform and output with OutputStream.
      class  PlatformXmlDataSerializer
      transform PlatformData to XML type defined in nexacro platform and output with OutputStream or Writer.
